rejection.message: The available transform-only adapter has one Vue 3 compiler instance and cannot preserve GitLab's Vue 2.7.16 plus Vue 3 compat 3.5.34 infection/compiler routing, custom-element settings, or loader lifecycle. Running it would produce a different graph, so direct Rolldown admission stops before transform.

sourceMapSemanticCorrectness.reason: Transform does not run after the compiler-contract rejection.

pluginDiagnosticParity.reason: The retained rejection is a harness capability diagnostic, not an ordinary-versus-worker plugin diagnostic comparison.
